name: ChatVLSC Cloudflare Secret Storage Plan

runtime_secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
runtime_secrets.runtime_use: AI Gateway REST calls from the Worker

runtime_secrets.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
runtime_secrets.runtime_use: OpenAI-backed OCR or review stages after route implementation

excluded_entries.reason: Tunnel token belongs in cloudflared service configuration, not Worker runtime secrets.
Mixed login and token handoff text, not a clean Microsoft Graph access token.
Media files are not configuration secrets.

required_cloudflare_permissions: Workers Scripts:Edit or equivalent permission to create/update Worker secrets
Secrets Store read/write permissions for account-level Secrets Store operations
Account read permission sufficient for Wrangler account discovery

safe_importer.secret_value_handling: Reads from the zip and streams Wrangler secret bulk JSON through stdin; does not write secret values to source files.
